panel.title: Kubernetes
delete.title: Delete resource
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {resource}?
settings.kubeconfigPath.label: Kubeconfig path
settings.kubeconfigPath.desc: Path to kubeconfig file. Leave empty to use default (~/.kube/config).
settings.pollInterval.label: Poll interval
settings.pollInterval.desc: How often to refresh data from the cluster (in seconds).
settings.showErrorBadge.label: Show error badge
settings.showErrorBadge.desc: Show a badge on the bar widget when a pod is in Error or CrashLoopBackOff state.
settings.terminal.label: Terminal emulator
settings.terminal.desc: Terminal emulator for kubectl describe/logs. Leave empty to use $TERMINAL.
settings.iconColor.label: Icon color
settings.iconColor.desc: Color of the bar widget icon.
settings.panelWidth.label: Panel width
settings.panelWidth.desc: Width of the panel in pixels.
settings.panelHeight.label: Panel height
settings.panelHeight.desc: Height of the panel in pixels.
